name: Reflex Plus Adult Cat Food Breed Series Persian Hypoallergenic 1.5kg
shortDescription: Reflex Plus Persian Adult Cat Food is a super-premium dry diet for Persian cats 12+ months. Supports digestion, urinary health, immunity, and a shiny coat.
description: Complete & Balanced Super Premium Dry Food for Persian Cats (12+ Months) Reflex Plus Persian Adult Cat Food is a complete and balanced dry diet specially formulated for Persian cats over 12 months old. Made with high-quality animal proteins, it delivers optimal nutrition while supporting overall health, digestive wellness, urinary tract health, and a shiny, healthy coat. Enriched with functional ingredients such as prebiotics, L-carnitine, psyllium, DL-methionine, blueberries, and Yucca Schidigera, this food promotes immunity, urinary health, cell renewal, hairball prevention, and reduced fecal odor. Key Benefits Formulated specifically for Persian cats (12+ months) 88% of total protein comes from premium animal ingredients Supports immune and digestive system health (FOS & MOS prebiotics) Promotes urinary tract health and helps regulate urine pH (DL-Methionine) Prevents hairball formation and supports bowel regulation (Psyllium) Contains antioxidants for cell renewal and immune support (Blueberries, Vitamins C & E) Reduces fecal odor naturally (Yucca Schidigera) Boosts energy metabolism (L-Carnitine) Ingredients Chicken proteins (dehydrated), Corn, Chicken fat, Rice, Corn gluten, Fish protein, Dried beet pulp, Fish oil, Liver aroma, Fiber concentrate, Hydrolyzed chicken protein, Psyllium fiber, DL-Methionine, Vitamins and minerals, Brewer's yeast, Brown algae, Salt, Flaxseed, Yucca schidigera, MOS (mannan oligosaccharides), Blueberries, FOS (fructo-oligosaccharides), L-carnitine, Preservatives – antioxidants (E320 & E321). Analytical Constituents Crude Protein: 32% Crude Fat: 16% Crude Ash: 7.5% Crude Fibre: 3.2% Nutritional Supplements Vitamins: Vitamin A: 18,000 IU/kg Vitamin D3: 1,500 IU/kg Vitamin E: 200 mg/kg Vitamin C: 200 mg/kg B Vitamins (B1, B2, B3, B6, B12, Biotin, Folic Acid), Vitamin K3, Choline, Calcium Pantothenate Taurine: 1,500 mg/kg Minerals: Iron, Iodine, Copper, Manganese, Zinc, Selenium Feeding Guidelines Suitable for Persian cats aged 12 months and above Feed according to age, weight, and activity level Provide fresh drinking water at all times Introduce any diet changes gradually over 5–7 days Store in a cool, dry place
